issues.title: support KAG
issues.body:
Please do a quick search on GitHub issues first, the feature you are about to request might have already been requested.

**Expected Behavior**

provider KAG feature like RAG

**Current Behavior**

nothing

**Context**

recently，AI has a new feature in augmented generation subdomain is  KAG(Knowledge Augmented Generation), that will the next generation RAG tech.

https://github.com/OpenSPG/KAG

labels.name: RAG
labels.description: Issues related to Retrieval Augmented Generation
